Open-Source & Peer Review

Community &
Open Collaboration

Meet collaborators and partner organizations supporting responsible AI governance through open-source collaboration and rigorous peer review.

Join Us

Open Collaboration Roles

We're building an open-source ecosystem. These key roles support peer review, community contributions, and framework evolution.

Open Source Community Lead

Coordinate community contributions, manage GitHub workflows, and foster an inclusive contributor ecosystem.

GitHub Community Building Documentation
Looking for contributors

Ethics & Policy Advisor

Provide academic and research perspective on AI ethics, policy implications, and regulatory alignment.

AI Ethics Policy Research Academia
Looking for contributors

Technical Documentation Lead

Ensure framework documentation quality, maintain API references, and create implementation guides.

Technical Writing Documentation Tutorials
Looking for contributors

Data Privacy Specialist

GDPR and privacy compliance expertise for AI systems, data protection impact assessments, and privacy-by-design.

GDPR Privacy Data Protection
Looking for contributors

AI/ML Research Advisor

Academic research liaison for AI/ML innovations, fairness metrics, and cutting-edge governance research.

Machine Learning Research Fairness
Looking for contributors

Peer Review Committee

Independent reviewers to validate framework updates, assess new tools, and ensure scientific rigor.

Peer Review Validation Quality Assurance
Looking for contributors

Interested in Contributing?

Join our community of experts shaping the future of responsible AI governance. Whether you're a researcher, practitioner, or enthusiast, we welcome your contributions.

Contact Us View on GitHub
Ecosystem

Partners & Partnerships

Organizations collaborating with PALO Framework to advance responsible AI governance worldwide.

Academic Partners

Universities and research institutions contributing to AI ethics research and framework validation.

Partnerships Open

Industry Partners

Companies implementing PALO Framework and contributing real-world case studies and feedback.

Partnerships Open

Standards Bodies

Collaboration with ISO, IEEE, and other standards organizations for framework alignment.

Partnerships Open
